creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Fri Mar 25 09:40:49 UTC 2016
New revision: 411828
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/411828

Log:
  New port: net/freediameter

  freeDiameter provides an extensible platform for deploying
  a Diameter network for your Authentication, Authorization
  and Accounting needs, whether you are involved in research
  or a network operator.

  WWW: http://www.freediameter.net/

  PR:		197368
  Submitted by:	Nikola Kolev <koue@chaosophia.net>, Pablo Carboni <pcarboni@gmail.com>

  head/net/freediameter/
  head/net/freediameter/Makefile
  head/net/freediameter/distinfo
  head/net/freediameter/files/
  head/net/freediameter/files/freediameterd.in
  head/net/freediameter/files/patch-libfdcore_sctp.c
  head/net/freediameter/pkg-descr
  head/net/freediameter/pkg-plist
